theme: Strict Black & White Minimalist (Apple-like + GenZ Attitude)

headings.usage: Massive, expressive sizing (text-6xl to text-8xl). Use tracking-tighter for impact. DO NOT use generic sans like Inter for headings.

body.usage: Sarcastic, deadpan tech feel. Use for descriptions, small text, and form inputs.

colors.rules: Strict grayscale. Absolutely no bright colors or generic gradients.

visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle SVG grain/noise overlay (opacity-5) to kill digital flatness.
visual_enhancers.borders: Crisp 1px solid borders for defined sections.
visual_enhancers.shadows: No soft drop shadows. Flat design or stark brutalist 4px solid black offset shadows.

components.buttons: Pill-shaped (rounded-full). Default: bg-black text-white. Hover: smooth invert to bg-white text-black with black border.
components.cards: Bento-style grids. Sharp edges or slight rounding (rounded-2xl). Generous padding (p-8 to p-12).
components.inputs: Brutalist minimalism. Transparent background, single 1px bottom border, huge text. No surrounding box.

layouts.hero: Asymmetrical. Massive left-aligned headline, right-aligned floating panda logo.
layouts.story: Monospace typewriter effect or large sarcastic static text.
layouts.how_it_works: Asymmetrical 3-step grid. Lots of negative space.
layouts.pain_points: High density 2x2 grid. Pure typography, heavy contrast.
layouts.waitlist: Full screen inverted section (black bg, white text). Massive input fields.
layouts.footer: Ultra minimal. No social links. Just a copyright and a sarcastic sign-off.

motion.panda_logo: Combined breathing (scale: [1, 1.03, 1]) and bobbing (y: [-10, 10, -10]). CSS/Framer Motion.
motion.hover_states: Buttons and cards invert colors. transition-colors duration-300 ease-in-out.
motion.entrance: Staggered fade-up (y: 20px -> 0px) for text blocks and cards.

accessibility.contrast: Strict high contrast. All text must be clearly readable against background.
accessibility.focus: High contrast outline on focus (ring-2 ring-black).
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute.

image_urls.description: LazyGen sleepy panda logo. Focal point of Hero and Story sections.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the frontend in React (.jsx/.js files) and Tailwind CSS.
Use Framer Motion for the Panda bobbing/breathing animation and scroll reveals.
Ensure Waitlist form posts data to the FastAPI/MongoDB backend correctly.
Implement a subtle grain/noise overlay across the entire app.
Stick strictly to the black and white theme. Use 'Outfit' for headings and 'JetBrains Mono' for body if possible, or fallback to system sans/mono smartly.
Ensure all data-testid attributes are present (e.g., data-testid='waitlist-email-input').
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic outputs. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements.
You MUST NOT center align the app container. Avoid generic centered layouts.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped with interaction animations.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters. Use lucide-react or @phosphor-icons/react.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, etc.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
